Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class TradeCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.TradeCreate
public class TradeCreate extends Object
TradeCreate

A Trade represents an entire order made by a client. Trades can hold one or many executions representing partial fills that aggregate into a whole order.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes

  • Constructor Details

    • TradeCreate

      public TradeCreate(String accountId, Optional<String> additionalInstructions, Optional<String> alternateOrderId, TradeCreateAssetType assetType, TradeCreateBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity, String clientOrderId, Optional<String> executingBroker, List<ExecutionCreate> executions, Optional<? extends List<BookingFeeCreate>> fees, String identifier, TradeCreateIdentifierType identifierType, Optional<String> issuingRegionCode, Optional<? extends DateCreate> localMarketTradeDate, Optional<? extends List<LotCreate>> lotMatchingInstructions, Optional<String> micCode, Optional<Boolean> open, Optional<String> orderId, RouteType routeType, Optional<? extends DateCreate> settlementDate, TradeCreateSide side, Optional<? extends SideModifier> sideModifier, String sourceApplication, Optional<? extends List<SpecialInstructions>> specialInstructions, Optional<? extends Venue> venue, Optional<? extends WhenIssued> whenIssued)

    • TradeCreate

      public TradeCreate(String accountId, TradeCreateAssetType assetType, TradeCreateBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity, String clientOrderId, List<ExecutionCreate> executions, String identifier, TradeCreateIdentifierType identifierType, RouteType routeType, TradeCreateSide side, String sourceApplication)

  • Method Details

    • accountId

      public String accountId()
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account.

    • additionalInstructions

      public Optional<String> additionalInstructions()
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

    • alternateOrderId

      public Optional<String> alternateOrderId()
      Fractional support for market-makers' internal order ids.

    • assetType

      public TradeCreateAssetType assetType()
      Type of the asset being traded.

    • brokerCapacity

      public TradeCreateBrokerCapacity brokerCapacity()
      Broker capacity for the trade.

    • clientOrderId

      public String clientOrderId()
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. Must be unique by date per trade per client.

    • executingBroker

      public Optional<String> executingBroker()
      Executing broker of the trade.

    • executions

      public List<ExecutionCreate> executions()
      The executions (sometimes referred to as partial-fills) that comprise the trade.

    • fees

      public Optional<List<BookingFeeCreate>> fees()
      Any client calculated fees associated with the trade. Only allowed if trade.open = false. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

    • identifier

      public String identifier()
      Identifier (of the type specified in `identifier_type`). Responses will supply the originally requested identifier.

    • identifierType

      public TradeCreateIdentifierType identifierType()
      Identifier type for the asset being traded.

    • issuingRegionCode

      public Optional<String> issuingRegionCode()
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • localMarketTradeDate

      public Optional<DateCreate> localMarketTradeDate()
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • lotMatchingInstructions

      public Optional<List<LotCreate>> lotMatchingInstructions()
      One or many lot matching instructions for the trade.

    • micCode

      public Optional<String> micCode()
      Market Identifier Code

    • open

      public Optional<Boolean> open()
      State of this trade's completeness in filling. True: trade is not done filling and can append more executions onto the trade False: trade is done filling and cannot append more executions onto the trade By default, trades are closed when they are created. An open trade can later be closed by calling the CompleteTrade endpoint. Additional executions can be appended to an open trade by calling the CreateExecution endpoint. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

    • orderId

      public Optional<String> orderId()
      Street-level order id, unique by day per broker.

    • routeType

      public RouteType routeType()
      Route type for the trade.

    • settlementDate

      public Optional<DateCreate> settlementDate()
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • side

      public TradeCreateSide side()
      Denotes if the trade is a SELL or a BUY.

    • sideModifier

      public Optional<SideModifier> sideModifier()
      Side modifier for the trade.

    • sourceApplication

      public String sourceApplication()
      The source of the submission.

    • specialInstructions

      public Optional<List<SpecialInstructions>> specialInstructions()
      An enumerated list of values used to indicate certain attributes about a trade (E.g. DISCRETION_EXERCISED, BROKER_LIQUIDATION) and/or trigger downstream processing rules (e.g. SUPPRESS_TRACE_REPORTING)

    • venue

      public Optional<Venue> venue()
      Exchange venue

    • whenIssued

      public Optional<WhenIssued> whenIssued()
      Denotes that this trade was either when_issued or when_distributed.

    • builder

      public static TradeCreate.Builder builder()

    • withAccountId

      public TradeCreate withAccountId(String accountId)
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account.

      public TradeCreate withAdditionalInstructions(String additionalInstructions)
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

      public TradeCreate withAdditionalInstructions(Optional<String> additionalInstructions)
      Free form instructions that can be used to provide additional instructions (that are not captured by existing special instructions) and will be put on the trade confirm.

      public TradeCreate withAlternateOrderId(String alternateOrderId)
      Fractional support for market-makers' internal order ids.

      Fractional support for market-makers' internal order ids.

      Broker capacity for the trade.

      public TradeCreate withClientOrderId(String clientOrderId)
      The unique identifier that is associated with an order. Must be unique by date per trade per client.

    • withExecutingBroker

      Executing broker of the trade.

      Executing broker of the trade.

      The executions (sometimes referred to as partial-fills) that comprise the trade.

    • withFees

      public TradeCreate withFees(List<BookingFeeCreate> fees)
      Any client calculated fees associated with the trade. Only allowed if trade.open = false. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

      Any client calculated fees associated with the trade. Only allowed if trade.open = false. Regulatory fees will be calculated automatically if they are not explicitly overwritten or suppressed.

      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

      public TradeCreate withIssuingRegionCode(Optional<String> issuingRegionCode)
      Unicode CLDR region code. Issuing Region Code is required for some `identifier_type`s, especially CUSIP.

    • withLocalMarketTradeDate

      public TradeCreate withLocalMarketTradeDate(DateCreate localMarketTradeDate)
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • withLocalMarketTradeDate

      public TradeCreate withLocalMarketTradeDate(Optional<? extends DateCreate> localMarketTradeDate)
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

      One or many lot matching instructions for the trade.

    • withOpen

      public TradeCreate withOpen(boolean open)
      State of this trade's completeness in filling. True: trade is not done filling and can append more executions onto the trade False: trade is done filling and cannot append more executions onto the trade By default, trades are closed when they are created. An open trade can later be closed by calling the CompleteTrade endpoint. Additional executions can be appended to an open trade by calling the CreateExecution endpoint. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

    • withOpen

      public TradeCreate withOpen(Optional<Boolean> open)
      State of this trade's completeness in filling. True: trade is not done filling and can append more executions onto the trade False: trade is done filling and cannot append more executions onto the trade By default, trades are closed when they are created. An open trade can later be closed by calling the CompleteTrade endpoint. Additional executions can be appended to an open trade by calling the CreateExecution endpoint. Trades that are left open will be automatically closed nightly before Ledger's EOD.

      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • withSettlementDate

      public TradeCreate withSettlementDate(Optional<? extends DateCreate> settlementDate)
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.
